\tzpentry{ID5434}{Ltotal Gyromagnetic Lagrangian}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5434 introduces Ltotal Gyromagnetic Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} Ltotal = Tgyro + Tfield -Umag -Uconstraint + Lcoupling \end{equation}
